lines.speaker: Paola
lines.text: Can't talk too long. I've got to go fast.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why do you need to go fast?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You might go a little faster if you put down that giant clock.

lines.speaker: Paola
lines.text: Then how would I check the time?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't think you'll be going anywhere at this rate. That goose hasn't moved an inch.

lines.speaker: Paola
lines.text: Be patient [player name], geese always move and cause mischief. If not, I know what we can serve for dinner in the pub.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll leave you to it then! Good luck!
